Memory checkup

No result data in this link

A shared result appears only when the URL contains numeric checkup fields. No note text is accepted.

This card contains numbers only. Note content stays on its owner's machine.

Your turn

Check your own memory

Run the checkup locally. You choose the folder and decide what to import.

npm i -g nautli
nautli init
nautli checkup ~/notes
